paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.12, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.
The recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding the release and call date for its second quarter 2026 earnings, which is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a total of 25 filings, with one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms, which disclose information such as the issuance of convertible senior notes and the resignation of a director.
